Giulio Romano

2 works in the gallery.

Design for a Frieze with a Putto and Acanthus Leaves
by Giulio Romano
Italy, 16th century · c. 1520 · Pen and brown ink, red and black chalk
Justice
by Giulio Romano
Italy · 1530–34 · pen and brown ink and wash within brown ink and red chalk framing lines
